UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHINDLER, ROBERT A., TRUSTEE OF A DECLARATION OF TRUST DATED NOV. 14, 1980 SCHINDLER, ANITA SUSAN, TRUSTEE OF A DECLARATION OF TRUST DATED NOV. 14, 1980 AS TO DEFENDANT SCRIBNER, DAVID INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA BLACK IRIS GALLERY GUINTHER, JACQUI INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA BLACK IRIS GALLERY\ DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: NO APP BY DEFT DAVID SCRIBNER FOR TRIAL; OUT OF STATE PER COUNSEL FOR 2ND DEFT GUINTHER, WHO IS PRESENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

DEPT. 2, RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, JUDGE; B. YEE, CSR; V.T. INVENTADO, CLERK. 2:40 PM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTFS & COUNSEL PRESENT; DEFT JACQUI GUINTHER IND & DBA BLACK IRIS GALLERY PRESENT; DEFT DAVID SCRIBNER FAILED TO APPEAR; HARRY TOM MILLER COUNSEL FOR BOTH DEFENDANTS PRESENT. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFT JACQUI GUINTHER IND & DBA BLACK IRIS GALLERY ENTERED ON THE RECORD. 2:45 PM PROVE UP AGAINST DEFT DAVID SCRIBNER. PLTF WITNESS A. S. SCHINDLER S/E. EXH 1 LEASE AGREEMENT ID & ADMITTED WITNESS EXCUSED. 2:50 PM PLTF WITNESS LUCATERO S/E. EXH 2 NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT ID & ADMITTED EXH 3 3 DAY NOTICE CANCEL OF LEASE ID & ADMITTED. WITNESS EXCUSED. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AGAINST DEFENDANT. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT AS TO BOTH DEFTS. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLTF PER MOTION.

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHINDLER, ROBERT A., TRUSTEE OF A DECLARATION OF TRUST DATED NOV. 14, 1980 SCHINDLER, ANITA SUSAN, TRUSTEE OF A DECLARATION OF TRUST DATED NOV. 14, 1980 COURT TRIAL SET FOR JAN-06-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCRIBNER, DAVID INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA BLACK IRIS GALLERY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1250 FOLSOM, GROUND FLOOR, FRONT UNIT, SF $4,702.96 RENT, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,785.96, LEASE FORFEITED, AND JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF & AGAINST DEFENDANT, JACQUI GUINTHER, INDIVIDUALLY & DBA BLACK IRIS GALLERY, FOR RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 1250 FOLSOM, GROUND FLOOR, FRONT UNIT, SF & FOR RENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $6300.00; RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SCRIBNER, DAVID INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA BLACK IRIS GALLERY
